title: Bloqpack (Cobblemon)
description: A lightweight modpack featuring cobblemon as it's main focus. With mods like create and farmers delight to spice up normal minecraft day to days like food and crafting. Official modpack of the Taterbloq server, when it is released.
body:
**Modpack for the Taterbloq server which will be releasing soon and is currently in alpha.**

________________________________________________________________________________________________                  

  The Bloqpack offers a unique cobblemon experience intended to make moments where you must return to regular minecraft activities like gathering resources or making food more fun and less time consuming. We at Taterbloq believe it can be a bit of a drag when you're forced to stop exploring or hunting for that rare pokemon because your food bar is low or your pickaxe needs repairs, and so we've made those systems more interesting.

The server itself offers several server-side mods that help to accomplish this goal as well, such as:

- Pokemon hunts where you will be rewarded for seeking out and capturing the specified pokemon
- Breeding with no cooldown. This makes the process smoother and less time consuming
- Pokemounts to streamline travel and incentivize hunting for and capturing the perfect mount
- Several datapacks adding more pokemon to see, to be a pokemon master is your destiny!
- And soon to be, a TM making process that encourages pokemon trading between friends
